I_AdminAccount: INSERT INTO tb_users (account, passwd, username, userlevel) VALUES(@account, @passwd, @username, @userlevel)
I_ParkingZone: INSERT INTO tb_parking_zone (parking_name, file_address, floor) VALUES (@parking_name, @file_address, @floor)
I_TbLots: INSERT INTO tb_lots (tag, lot_type, point, asset, floor) VALUES (@tag, @lot_type, @point, @asset, @floor)
S_Information: SELECT tag, lot_type, isUsed, asset, floor FROM tb_lots
S_ReqLogin: SELECT * FROM tb_users WHERE account = @account AND passwd = @passwd
S_ReqLogin2: SELECT uid, account, username, userlevel, isActivated FROM tb_users WHERE account = @account AND passwd = @passwd
S_LotInfo: SELECT uid, point, lot_type, asset, isUsed, floor FROM tb_lots
#S1: SELECT id, datetime(timestamp, localtime) AS timestamp, parking_lot FROM parking_data ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 1
I_Rawdata: INSERT INTO rawdata (id, timestamp, parking_lot) VALUES (@id, @timestamp, @parking_lot)
S_TbLots: SELECT * FROM tb_lots WHERE floor NOT LIKE 'ALL'
U_TbLots: UPDATE tb_lots SET isUsed = @isUsed WHERE tag = @tag
I_TbLotStatus: INSERT INTO tb_lot_status (lot, isParked, added) VALUES (@lot, @isParked, @added)
S_TbLotStatus: SELECT * FROM tb_lot_status WHERE added >= @start_time AND added < @end_time
S_CountProcessedDb: SELECT COALESCE(COUNT(*), 0) AS count FROM processed_db WHERE recorded_hour = @time
I_processedDB: INSERT INTO processed_db (lot , car_type, hour_parking, recorded_hour) VALUES (@lot, @car_type, @hour_parking, @recorded_hour)
init_TbLotStatus: | BEGIN TRANSACTION; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tb_lot_status; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS rawdata; CREATE TABLE tb_lot_status ( uid INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, lot INTEGER, isParked INTEGER DEFAULT 0, added DATETIME, FOREIGN KEY (lot) REFERENCES tb_lots(uid) ); CREATE TABLE rawdata ( "id" INTEGER, "timestamp" TEXT, "parking_lot" TEXT ); COMMIT; VACUUM
S_ProcessedDB: SELECT * FROM processed_db WHERE recorded_hour LIKE @checkdate
S_CountRecordedDay: SELECT COALESCE(COUNT(*), 0) AS count FROM perday WHERE recorded_day = @time
I_PerDay: INSERT INTO perday (lot ,car_type, day_parking, recorded_day) VALUES (@lot ,@car_type, @day_parking, @fromattedTime)
S_PerDay: SELECT * FROM perday WHERE recorded_day LIKE @checkdate
S_CountPerMonth: SELECT COALESCE(COUNT(*), 0) AS count FROM permonth WHERE recorded_month = @time
I_PerMonth: INSERT INTO permonth (lot, car_type, month_parking, recorded_month) VALUES (@lot, @car_type, @month_parking, @fromattedTime)
S_PerMonth: SELECT * FROM permonth WHERE recorded_month LIKE @checkdate
S_CountPerYear: SELECT COALESCE(COUNT(*), 0) AS count FROM peryear WHERE recorded_year = @time
I_PerYear: INSERT INTO peryear (lot, car_type, year_parking, recorded_year) VALUES (@lot, @car_type, @year_parking, @fromattedTime)
S_TbUsers: SELECT account, username, userlevel, isActivated FROM tb_users
U_TbUsers: UPDATE tb_users SET (username, userlevel, isActivated) = (@username, @userlevel, @isActivated) WHERE account = @account
I_UserAdd: INSERT INTO tb_users (account, passwd, username, userlevel, isActivated) VALUES (@account, @passwd, @username, @userlevel, @isActivated)
S_TbParkingSurface: SELECT tag, engine_code, uri FROM tb_parking_surface
U_TbParkingSurface: UPDATE tb_parking_surface SET (tag, engine_code, uri) = (@tag, @engine_code, @uri) WHERE uid = @uid
I_TbParkingSurface: INSERT INTO tb_parking_surface (tag, engine_code, uri) VALUES (@tag, @engine_code, @uri)
U_LotType: UPDATE tb_lots SET (lot_type, tag) = (@lot_type, @changed_tag) WHERE tag = @tag
U_TbDbSetting: UPDATE tb_db_setting SET engine_db_addr = @changeEngine WHERE uid = 1
S_OneDayAll: SELECT hour_parking, recorded_hour FROM processed_db where hour_parking = 1
S_OneDay: SELECT hour_parking, recorded_hour FROM processed_db WHERE hour_parking = 1 AND (recorded_hour LIKE @yesterday OR (recorded_hour >= @today AND recorded_hour <= @hourago))
S_OneWeek: SELECT day_parking, recorded_day FROM perday where day_parking = 1 AND (recorded_day >= @last_month AND recorded_day < @today)
S_Search: SELECT day_parking, recorded_day FROM perday where day_parking = 1 AND (recorded_day >= @startDay AND recorded_day <= @endDay)
S_OneMonthAll: SELECT uid, car_type, month_parking, recorded_month FROM permonth
S_OneMonth: SELECT day_parking, recorded_day FROM perday WHERE day_parking = 1 AND (recorded_day >= @last_month AND recorded_day < @today)
S_OneYearAll: SELECT uid, car_type, month_parking, recorded_month FROM permonth
S_OneYear: SELECT month_parking, recorded_month FROM permonth where month_parking = 1 AND (recorded_month >= @lastYear AND recorded_month < @today)
SeveralYearsAll: SELECT uid, car_type, year_parking, recorded_year FROM peryear
SeveralYears: SELECT day_parking, recorded_day FROM perday where day_parking = 1 AND (recorded_day >= @last_month AND recorded_day < @today)
S_graph: SELECT t.recorded_hour, t.car_type, l.floor, COUNT(*) AS count FROM processed_db t LEFT JOIN tb_lots l ON t.lot = l.uid WHERE t.recorded_hour >= @startDay AND t.recorded_hour <= @endDay GROUP BY t.recorded_hour, t.car_type, l.floor ORDER BY t.recorded_hour, t.car_type, l.floor;
usedLot: SELECT uid FROM tb_lot_type WHERE isUsed = 1;
usedfloor: SELECT DISTINCT floor FROM tb_lots WHERE floor <> ALL;
graphData: SELECT SUBSTR(processed_db.recorded_hour, 1, 13) AS hour, COUNT(*) AS count , Floor FROM tb_lots JOIN processed_db ON tb_lots.uid = processed_db.lot WHERE tb_lots.floor = @floor AND processed_db.hour_parking = 1  AND processed_db.recorded_hour LIKE @day AND tb_lots.lot_type = @lot_type GROUP BY hour ORDER BY hour;
central_usedLot: SELECT uid FROM tb_lot_type WHERE isUsed = 1;
central_usedfloor: SELECT DISTINCT floor FROM tb_lots WHERE floor <> ALL;
allParkingLot: SELECT count(*) AS count FROM tb_lots WHERE floor <> ALL;
usedParkingLot: SELECT count(*) AS count FROM tb_lots WHERE floor <> ALL AND isUsed = 1;
parked_lot: SELECT count(*) FROM tb_lots WHERE floor <> ALL AND isUsed = 1 AND lot_type = @lot;
count: SELECT COUNT(*) AS count FROM tb_lots WHERE floor <> ALL AND floor = @floor AND lot_type = @lot_type AND isUsed = 1;
base: INSERT INTO base (name, address, latitude, longitude, manager, phone_number) VALUES (@name, @address, @latitude, @longitude, @manager, @phoneNumber),
checking: SELECT COUNT(uid) AS count from base,
get_base: UPDATE base SET (name, address, latitude, longitude, manager, phone_number) = (@name, @address, @latitude, @longitude, @manager, @phoneNumber) WHERE uid = 1,
cal_get: SELECT SUBSTR(tag, 1, 6) AS camera, COUNT(tag) AS tag_count, SUM(CASE WHEN isUsed = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS isUsed_count FROM tb_lots WHERE floor <> ALL GROUP BY camera ORDER BY camera;
